faq.heading: What holds you back before you start.

q_01.a: MT4 import isn't stable yet — it's on the roadmap. Today the focus is MT5 (XLSX and HTML) and NinjaTrader via CSV for US brokers.

q_02.a: Yes. One click in the Stripe portal. No fee, no lock-in. You keep access until the end of your paid cycle.

q_03.a: Yes. Everything runs on Supabase with Row Level Security — only you see your trades. We never ask for your broker credentials. Payments are processed by Stripe (PCI Level 1).

q_04.q: How is this different from Tradezella or Edgewonk?
q_04.a: Pricing in your currency, Portuguese-first support, and a real AI (Dexter) that reads your history and shows you patterns — not just pretty charts. Plus direct prop-firm integration and a macro calendar.

q_05.q: Does it work with major prop firms?
q_05.a: Yes. The5ers and FTMO already have dedicated panels with real-time rule tracking. Other firms (FundedNext, Topstep, Apex, MyForexFunds) work via the standard MT5 import — dedicated panels land as demand ramps up.

q_06.q: Do I need to speak English?
q_06.a: No. The entire platform is available in Portuguese — including the macro briefing, tags, and Dexter. English is optional (toggle in the UI).

q_07.q: Do I have to connect my MT5 to the cloud?
q_07.a: No. You upload the XLSX/HTML report MT5 already generates locally. No broker credentials ever touch our servers.

q_08.q: What if I trade multiple accounts?
q_08.a: Pro supports 5 simultaneous accounts (prop + personal + crypto). Ultra is unlimited. You can compare accounts side by side and split metrics by firm.

q_09.a: No. Dexter analyzes your history and surfaces patterns — a human mentor teaches strategy and corrects psychology in real time. They complement each other.

q_10.q: Do I have a return guarantee?
q_10.a: No. Nobody serious guarantees trading returns. What we guarantee is the tool: if it doesn't fit your workflow, you cancel and move on. No promises we can't keep.

manifesto.heading: Trading isn't about luck. It's about evidence.

intro.body: Most traders blow up. Not for lack of will, discipline or courage. They blow up because they trade in the dark — deciding without data, repeating a pattern they never measured, buying a story about themselves the numbers quietly disagree with. We built wealth to turn the dark off.

section_01.title: Most blow up — and it isn't for lack of strategy.
section_01.body: Every trader you've watched blow up had a plan. Had favorite setups. Had a good window and a bad one. Had strong opinions about what works. The problem was never the absence of strategy — it was the absence of verification.

section_02.title: It's because they're trading blind.
section_02.body: Without data, intuition turns into truth. "I lose more on Thursdays" sticks. "My pullback setup is the best one" sticks. Decisions follow the internal story. Months go by, equity drops, and the trader still repeats the same lines. The spreadsheet that was supposed to correct them turned into a graveyard of forgotten rows.

section_03.title: Data changes everything.
section_03.body: What an honest platform does is lower the cost of confronting your own history. Automatic MT5 import. Every trade with macro context, error tag, session, mental state. You open the dashboard and the story breaks: Thursday was fine. The pullback was below average. What actually sustains your curve is another setup, another session, another size. From that point on, you trade differently.

section_04.title: What we believe.
section_04.body:
1. Evidence > intuition. Always.
2. The journal that works is the one that fills itself in.
3. Good AI doesn't hand you an answer — it shows the pattern you missed.
4. Honest pricing. Honest support. Honest about what the tool ships today and what it doesn't.

section_05.title: Who it's for.
section_05.body: For the trader who has already lost money, already been taken off an account, already run a prop firm challenge and stared at the chart exhausted. For the trader who suspects there's a pattern in there and wants to stop guessing. For anyone on MT5, on a prop firm, on NinjaTrader — and willing to trade spreadsheet for evidence.

section_06.title: What we're building.
section_06.body: A platform where your trades become data, your data becomes a pattern and your pattern becomes a decision. Where prop firms have a live panel. Where macro doesn't catch you off guard. Where Dexter, our AI analyst, reads your history and tells you what you didn't see — in plain language, with numbers, not marketing.

hub.heading: Three pillars.
hub.headingAccent: One honest decision at a time.
hub.subhead: What wealth does across three surfaces that talk to each other. Journal feeds Dexter. Dexter cross-references with Macro. Macro warns you before the news breaks your trade.

journal.label: Journal
journal.title: Every MT5 order becomes evidence — not a spreadsheet row.
journal.subtitle: Upload in seconds, real PnL, real win rate, live equity curve. The track record you never had time to build by hand.

bullets.0: MT5 import via XLSX, HTML or account number — 10k trades in under a minute
bullets.1: 12 recurring error tags (rushed, revenge, fomo, off-plan…) — one click per trade
bullets.2: Filters by weekday, session, setup, tag — the story breaks where the data shows it
bullets.3: Live dashboard for PnL, win rate, MFE/MAE, mathematical expectancy, recovery factor
bullets.4: Per-account comparison (prop, personal, crypto) — which one is really carrying you
bullets.5: CSV and PDF export for when you need to bring evidence to a mentor or prop firm

dexter.label: Dexter AI
dexter.title: An analyst who reads your history and works 24/7.
dexter.subtitle: Not a chatbot. Dexter is analytical AI that connects your trades to macro, identifies a pattern you don't see and hands back insight with numbers — not opinions.

bullets.0: Automatic analysis of your patterns: best setup, best time window, recurring mistake
bullets.1: Alerts when your behavior drifts from plan — before it turns into a loss
bullets.2: Cross-references your PnL with the macro calendar (CPI, NFP, rate decisions) to find blind spots
bullets.3: Weekly email report: what worked, what didn't, what to change over the next 7 days
bullets.4: Unlimited queries on the Ultra plan — ask anything about your own history
bullets.5: Multi-layer: fundamentals, technicals, risk, final thesis — in 30 seconds, in plain language

macro.label: Macro
macro.title: Bloomberg in your pocket.
macro.subtitle: Economic calendar with impact, live headlines, central bank rates and a daily briefing — everything that moves your asset before the chart does.

bullets.0: Live economic calendar: CPI, NFP, rate decisions, PPI, PMI — impact tagged per release
bullets.1: Real-time headlines from trusted sources (FinancialJuice, TradingEconomics) — no noise
bullets.2: Rates for the major central banks (Fed, ECB, BoE, BoJ, Bacen) — last action and next one
bullets.3: Daily macro briefing at 7am in your inbox: what matters today, in three paragraphs
bullets.4: Daily scenario updates when a headline shifts the narrative — you never stand still
bullets.5: Sunday weekly report on what to expect ahead — planning before the open
